title: Daily Digest not available and My Work can't handle the volume
excerpt: IWe have a problem where the My Work screen cannot handle more than 1000 tasks assigned to an individual so misses off overdue and current due tasks in favour of future tasks. We have no option for a daily digest style e…

posts.author: HStothard (Helen Stothard)
posts.cookedHtml:
IWe have a problem where the My Work screen cannot handle more than 1000 tasks assigned to an individual so misses off overdue and current due tasks in favour of future tasks. We have no option for a daily digest style email as that shows unavailable and setting up an automation wouldn’t work as we’d have to manually select every single board.

The team I work in has around 300 live projects with a minimum of 100 tasks per board and some can be double this. The projects change daily due to new projects and project close down and team members can be working across 60 project boards.

I need the team members to be able to get an accurate list of overdue and current tasks assigned to them. My Work would be the preference but it can’t handle the volume as I have mentioned and setting up an automation won’t work either due to scale.

This is just one team out of several across the company.

Surely a basic feature such as a list of tasks due today isn’t too much to ask.

I’ve exhausted all options and support on this so grateful to hear any workarounds that dont involve paying for yet more add ons to cover basic functionality requirements.
